doctor_turn: Uh, what brings you in here today?
patient_turn: Uhm, so I've had this runny nose, well first it was a stuffy nose, but now I've had this runny nose for the past week and a half and it doesn't seem to be getting any better. So I was just wondering if you could give me something for that?

doctor_turn: So when did it start getting stuffy?
patient_turn: Uhm, it started getting stuffy about two weeks ago.

doctor_turn: And when did it start getting, like just a runny nose?
patient_turn: Yeah, that started a week and a half ago.

doctor_turn: Have these symptoms gotten worse at all?
patient_turn: No, it stayed about the same.

doctor_turn: Do you have any coughing?
Any fevers or chills?
From the runny nose, are you having any yellow or green discharge?
Have you at all coughed up any blood at all?
Do these symptoms come and go, or are they pretty constant?
Is there anything that you have tried that has helped you with these symptoms?
patient_turn: No, I haven't tried anything. I've been thinking about using some nasal decongestion but I don't want to make my runny nose any worse.

doctor_turn: Are you having any other symptoms at all, like shortness of breath, chest pain, dizziness?
patient_turn: No dizziness, I feel like sometimes I have a headache though, because I feel like there's a lot of fluid or something backed up into my sinuses.

doctor_turn: Are you feeling that pressure in your face at all?
Have you had contact with anyone that was sick?
patient_turn: No, nothing like that, that I can think of.

doctor_turn: Any travel?
Any symptoms of a loss of taste or smell?
Any nausea or vomiting?
Any night sweats?
How about fatigue, or do you feel tired?
Do you work at all?
patient_turn: I work from home right now.

doctor_turn: Has this affected your work in any way?
Where do you live?
Do you live with anyone?
Any mold or dust or fumes in your household?
patient_turn: I have some old carpets, but that's about it.

doctor_turn: Any changes in your sleep or appetite?
Any changes in your bowel movement, like diarrhea or constipation?
Any urinary trouble?
Any weight loss?
Do you have any past medical conditions like asthma?
Any allergies that you know of?
Do you take any regular medications?
patient_turn: Uh no, I don't even take vitamins.

doctor_turn: Any hospitalizations or surgeries in the past?
patient_turn: I had an arm fracture when I was younger, but that's it.

doctor_turn: Other than that, nothing else?
Do you smoke cigarettes at all?
Have you smoked in the past?
Any recreational drugs like marijuana?
Do you drink alcohol?
patient_turn: Once in a while I'll have like a glass of wine every week.

doctor_turn: Do you have any questions?
patient_turn: Uh, no, what can I do about this runny nose?

doctor_turn: Is that, does that sound good to you?
patient_turn: Yeah, that sounds great. Thank you so much.

doctor_turn: You're welcome, take care.
